_doc: Project-local Claude Code settings. Layered on top of .claude/settings.json. Adds three hooks aimed at the four worktree gotchas in user memory: (1) PostToolUse on Agent — pycache cleanup + parent editable-install rebind; (2) UserPromptSubmit — refuses dangerous git ops; (3) PostToolUse on Edit|Write of results/calibration-*.json — emits auto_downscope hint, informational only. See .claude/hooks/README.md.
